channel.title: Random on Azure Readiness starts here...
channel.description: Recent content in Random on Azure Readiness starts here...

item.title: How OnyxBoox - with some help from a friend - got me back to reading more... books
item.description: I have to admit, I am not a real book reader, and the bit of reading I am doing typically involves Azure-related tech books, or what my wife and family describes as “business books” (Biographies, Non-fiction company stories such as the start of Netflix, Uber, Silicon Valley,…). For several years, I relied on an Amazon Kindle app on my (cheap) Samsung A8 tablet, dating from the time I was traveling weekly and wanted to travel light.
